stories.headline: US, Iran Weigh Potential Deal, Trump Says ‘We Won’
stories.summary: Trump told reporters at the White House that he didn’t have a deadline to reach an agreement with Iran, but predicted “it’ll happen” and declared “we won” the war. Meanwhile, the US and Iran are circling around a fresh proposal. Bloomberg’s Jeff Mason reports.

stories.headline: Iran war live: Trump says deal with Tehran ‘possible’; Israel bombs Beirut
stories.summary: UN calls on Israel to free two members of Gaza aid flotilla abducted in international waters and held without charge.

stories.headline: US fires at Iranian oil tanker as Trump pushes for peace deal
stories.summary: Tehran has yet to respond to Washington's plan, but Iran's chief negotiator warned the US is seeking to force the Islamic Republic's 'surrender'. It it unclear how the one-page memorandum differs from the 14-point plan proposed by Iran last week.

LME Sees Hong Kong Sheds Swelling to Hundreds of Thousands Tons

stories.headline: RBNZ’s Frequent Remit Adjustments Risk Policy Error, OECD Warns
stories.summary: New Zealand should reconsider how frequently it adjusts the Reserve Bank’s remit because it raises the risk of monetary policy mistakes, according to the Organisation for Economic Cooperation and Development.

stories.headline: Wall Street Dares to Ask If China’s Property Turnaround Is Close
stories.summary: Just months into China’s housing downturn, the nation’s second-biggest developer declared the worst is over. A year later, its chairman backtracked on the call, and by 2025, it was teetering on the brink of a default.

stories.headline: Judge Says F.B.I. Can Keep 2020 Election Records Seized From Georgia
stories.summary: The ruling is the latest in a saga driven by President Trump’s desire for redemption in the state, which he lost in 2020. The county is likely to appeal.

stories.headline: Susan Collins Says She Has Long Had a Benign Tremor
stories.summary: The Republican senator from Maine, running for re-election at age 73 in one of this year’s top Senate races, made the disclosure after mounting online scrutiny on the left.

stories.headline: Judge denies request to return 2020 ballots seized from Fulton County, Georgia
stories.summary: The FBI’s seizure of Fulton County’s voting materials has stoked alarm among election officials and democracy advocates.

stories.summary: A key measure of bulk-shipping rates jumped to the highest level since December 2023, driven by rising demand for Capesize vessels along with tightening supply of ships that haul bulk commodities.

stories.headline: Singapore introduces caning for boys who bully others at school
